title: Vibration Manipulation
wikitext:
[[File:Whitebeard_shakes_Marineford.gif|center|thumb|480px|[[Whitebeard]] is able to cause massive tremors in virtually any medium with the powers of the Tremor-Tremor Fruit]]

==Summary==
'''Vibration Manipulation''' is the ability to spontaneously create, manipulate, or otherwise utilize vibrations of any intensity in combat. This ability appears most frequently as an offensive attack, unsettling the ground beneath the target or sending destructive shockwaves to pummel foes. Note that this does not apply to characters who can't create and employ them in a way that differs from just being a side-effect of their attacks, with no specific function.

==Users==
*[[Whitebeard]] and [[Marshall D. Teach (Blackbeard)|Blackbeard]] ([[One Piece]])
*[[MegaMan.EXE]], [[Bass.EXE]], and many other NetNavis through various Battle Chips, [[Mega Man (Star Force)|Geo Stelar]] and [[Harp Note|Sonia Strumm]] through various Battle Cards ([[Mega Man (Franchise)|Mega Man]])
*[[Vibe (CW)|Vibe]], [[Flash]] and other Speed Force users ([[DC Comics]])
